name: Earthbound Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>縛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>融</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can only activate this card during the Main Phase, unless a card is in a Field Zone. Fusion Summon 1 DARK Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material. During your Main Phase, if a card is in a Field Zone: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Earthbound" monster from your hand or GY, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion or Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Earthbound Fusion" once per turn.
eff: You can only activate this card during the Main Phase, unless a card is in a Field Zone. Fusion Summon 1 DARK Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material. During your Main Phase, if a card is in a Field Zone: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Earthbound" monster from your hand or GY, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion or Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Earthbound Fusion" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
